response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive fullstack development experience across diverse technologies, including TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-aligned databases (MongoDB). His background includes building scalable platforms, integrating multiple data sources, and working with modern architectures (Kubernetes, AWS). While his experience leans more toward senior roles, his adaptability and pragmatic approach to software craftsmanship align well with the role's requirements.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and fullstack development experience across multiple projects and industries
Proven ability to integrate systems (CRM, automation tools, databases) and scale platforms for high traffic
Hands-on experience with modern DevOps practices (Docker, Kubernetes) and cloud services (AWS)
Demonstrated interest in clean architecture and collaborative development methodologies (TDD, pair programming)
concerns: May be overqualified for a junior/mid-level role due to extensive senior-level experience
Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (relies more on MongoDB), though SQL knowledge is present
Recent employment history shows frequent job changes, which may raise questions about long-term commitment
